notes: Projection page UI overhaul: (1) Removed the monthly cash-flow bar/line chart from the projection page (and its render code). (2) Current-month 'actual / target' cells redesigned: was cluttered 'X / Y' slash format, now a clean stacked cell — actual amount primary, small muted 'of <target>' below. New fmtDual() helper used across all 8 dual-value sites (categories, EMIs, salary, investments, planned savings). Current-month cell font slightly reduced. (3) Mobile month columns widened to 130px (was ~21% / cramped) so full INR amounts show comfortably. (4) Mobile projection now uses native continuous horizontal scroll with momentum + sticky first column, replacing the old 3-month block-swipe window. Scrolling free-flows (mar/apr/may → may/jun/jul). Auto-scrolls to current month on render. Old swipe/window/indicator code stubbed to no-ops. (5) Desktop: proj-table-wrap fills more screen height (100dvh - 150px), scrollbar restyled subtle/neutral. Scroll freely with mouse/trackpad/arrows in any direction.
